creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
It consistently fails to build in Poudriere on the system with 24GB of memory.

> mmap: Cannot allocate memory
> fatal error encountered in SBCL pid 35978 pthread 0x2c612000:
> Can't allocate 0xd100000 bytes for space 4

As a result I can't build depending packages in Poudriere on this machine.

How much memory does it need and why is the memory requirement so high?
